title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Onboarding left-swipe navigation stops at second screen and does not proceed to first screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or cleared data) to enter the onboarding flow.
Swipe left repeatedly to navigate through the onboarding screens until reaching the sixth (last) screen.
From the sixth screen, swipe left once — observe the navigation.
Continue swiping left from each subsequent screen until reaching the second screen.
From the second screen, attempt to swipe left again.
expected: Swiping left from the sixth screen navigates back through screens 5, 4, 3, and 2. On the second screen, further left swipes have no effect (the screen stays on the second screen). All screens match the Figma design.
